name: Light de deux
short_description: Ballet is a lot like love: in both, the partners' connection is all about trust. But will this bond be strong enough to keep two burning hearts together?
detailed_description:
Light de deux is a romantic kinetic novel about the love that emerges between two ballet dancers. Experience the story through the perspectives of the two main characters: Mark, a young man who lost his father as a kid and had to work endlessly to escape poverty, and Susanna, a girl who grew up in luxury but never got to feel any affection from her parents.

Features:
— Story shown through two perspectives
— Ukrainian voice acting
— Beautiful CG art

English, Ukrainian*, Simplified Chinese, Polish
*languages with full audio support
